settings.title: Settings
settings.igdb_desc: Optional. Enter your Twitch Developer credentials to show estimated play time.
settings.igdb_howto: Get your credentials at dev.twitch.tv — create an app, then copy the Client ID and Secret here.
settings.igdb_note: Not all games have duration data. After saving credentials, restart Maida to begin fetching.
settings.credentials_saved: Saved. IGDB data will appear on next restart.

telemetry.title: Anonymous Usage Data
telemetry.desc: Maida sends a single anonymous ping on each launch. No personal data, no game data, no tracking. You can turn this off anytime.
telemetry.privacy: What we collect: a random ID and how many days since install. That's it.

license.title: Maida Plus
license.desc_inactive: Enter your license key to unlock Kata.
license.label: License Key

katas.title: Kata
katas.hint: Choose a kata. Rin will present them to you, one at a time.
katas.locked_desc: Available with Maida Plus. Enter your key in settings.

curation.first_prompt: Is there a game you've been wanting to play?

legal.a11y_commitment: We want Maida to be usable by everyone, regardless of how you interact with your device.
legal.a11y_standards: This application aims to conform to WCAG 2.2 Level AA.
legal.a11y_testing: Tested on Windows with NVDA screen reader, keyboard navigation (Tab, arrow keys, Enter, Escape), and gamepad (D-pad, A/B buttons). Focus indicators, heading structure, and screen reader labels have been reviewed. Other platforms and assistive technologies have not been tested.
legal.a11y_feature_keyboard: You can use Maida entirely with a keyboard. Tab moves between items, arrow keys navigate, Enter selects, Escape goes back, and F2 renames a kata.
legal.a11y_feature_gamepad: If you use a gamepad, the D-pad moves between items, A/B work like Enter/Escape, and LB/RB switch between pages.
legal.a11y_feature_sr: Every button and control has a label that screen readers can read aloud.
legal.a11y_feature_focus: The currently selected item is always clearly highlighted so you know where you are.
legal.a11y_feature_motion: Maida is mostly static by design. Where animations exist, they follow your system's reduced motion setting.
legal.a11y_feature_transparency: Maida is available in English, Traditional Chinese, and Japanese, including all screen reader text.
legal.a11y_limitation_gamepad: When using a screen reader, the focus starts on NOT NOW so an accidental press won't launch a game. To try a game, move to the TRY button first with Tab or arrow keys, then press Enter.
legal.a11y_limitation_longpress: Some actions require holding a button down for a few seconds. We know this can be difficult if you have limited hand mobility.
legal.a11y_limitation_contrast: Some lighter text may be hard to read depending on your display settings.
legal.a11y_planned_threshold: The option to change how long you need to hold a button.
legal.a11y_planned_confirm: A tap-to-confirm mode so you don't have to hold buttons at all.
legal.a11y_planned_fontsize: The option to make text larger.
legal.a11y_contact: If you encounter accessibility issues, please contact
legal.privacy_collection: Maida sends a single anonymous ping on each launch to count active users. We do not collect personal data, game library data, or usage patterns. If this ever changes, the updated policy will be included in the application.
legal.privacy_storage: Your game data, preferences, and session logs are stored locally on your device and are not uploaded to external servers under normal operation.
legal.privacy_telemetry: You can disable the anonymous ping at any time in Settings.
legal.terms_your_choice: Maida presents options from your game library. What you do with them is entirely up to you.
legal.terms_no_guarantees: Maida is provided as-is. It may occasionally show unexpected results or miss games. We do our best, but we cannot promise it will always work perfectly.
legal.terms_free: Maida is free. If we ever introduce optional paid features, we will let you know in advance and they will not affect what you already have.
legal.terms_changes: These terms may be updated with new versions. Continued use after an update means you accept the changes.
legal.copyright_text: © 2026 Bright Raven World. All rights reserved.

onboarding.permission_intro: Maida can quietly look at what games you have, whenever you're ready.

error.steam_not_found: Steam not detected. You can try again later.

idle.no_games: No games found. Maida is waiting.
